_comment: Copy this file to test_llm.json and edit it to point at the LLM endpoint that the eval e2e tests should use. The conftest llm_endpoint fixture reads test_llm.json (which is gitignored) when COGNIVERSE_TEST_LLM_PROVIDER_URI is unset. Both fields are also accepted as the env vars COGNIVERSE_TEST_LLM_PROVIDER_URI and COGNIVERSE_TEST_LLM_BASE_URL.
